results.title: Francesca Hong's past comments on defunding police raised in CNN report
results.description: Hong said there is “no way” she would cut funding for public safety but wants to spend it on things she said would be more effective at reducing crime.

results.title: The Cockroach Party trend hits Pakistan after India
Registration mandatory for hawkers, rickshaws to operate: Dhaka South administrator
results.description: Current national problems could also be resolved through proper leadership and unity, he says

results.title: Gymkhana Club To Move Court After Centre Orders It To Vacate Lutyens' Property By June 5
results.description: The Central government asked Gymkhana Club to hand over the premises by June 5, saying the plot was required for "strengthening and securing defence infrastructure."
